description:
## Task

Objective:
- In our Ecology Dashboard http://localhost:3001/ecology I see that the numbers in there are all zero that cannnot be true. So please fix this. But before you fix this overthink this first do we have with this design a good way of taking care of our major intent, the major intent is to let the user of this mulit-agent AI enhanced system know what the ecological footprint if of the usage/ the running of the system as such. We should not only focus on AI usage but also about the usage of ressources which are consumed and processed by the infrastructure which is underneath the VM (or any other system a user might use and where the multi-agen is running on)
